refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall update the worksite model within the customer-required timeliness (p95 ≤ 1.0 s) for operational use, ensuring data accuracy and availability for all stakeholders.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed to explicitly address timeliness, data accuracy, and availability, which are critical for operational effectiveness and safety in a high-risk environment.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure the 95th percentile latency of worksite model updates under representative operational scenarios; verify data accuracy through cross-validation with sensor inputs; confirm availability via system uptime and interface responsiveness tests.
sub_frs: FR1: Acquire and process telemetry data from vehicles and sensors within 1.0 s latency.
FR2: Update the centralized worksite model with processed data ensuring consistency and accuracy.
FR3: Distribute updated worksite model data to all relevant modules and stakeholders within latency constraints.

candidate_dps: DP1: Real-time telemetry ingestion and preprocessing pipeline.
DP2: Centralized worksite model database with consistency management.
DP3: Low-latency data distribution mechanism using event-driven interfaces.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1, DP2, DP3 combined to fulfill sub-FRs with minimal coupling.

potential_sources: Telemetry data dependency between DP1 and DP2
Data distribution dependency between DP2 and DP3
coupling_check.notes: Coupling is managed via well-defined interfaces and asynchronous event-driven updates, minimizing tight coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network link latency and reliability meet operational requirements.
Risk of data inconsistency if update propagation is delayed or lost.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor network performance and implement fallback mechanisms to mitigate data loss.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system integration and coordination of telemetry ingestion, worksite model management, and data distribution.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time data from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends updated worksite model data to Vehicle and Teleoperation for operational use.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication between NGHE Solution and external modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the module centralizes update logic; low diffusion risk due to controlled interfaces.
Limited containment; high diffusion risk if update logic is duplicated here.
Moderate containment; risk of duplicated update handling.
Minimal containment; should not handle update logic to avoid diffusion.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing update latency logic in NGHE Solution minimizes diffusion and supports consistent timeliness enforcement.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck in NGHE Solution if processing load is high.
Dependency on network link reliability for timely data exchange.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Implement load balancing and redundancy within NGHE Solution; monitor network health continuously.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DPs logically satisfy the refined FRs with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Avoid duplication of update logic in Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
Ensure NGHE Solution remains the single source of truth for worksite model updates.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: NGHE Solution module shows strong containment scores, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via latency measurements and interface testing across NGHE Solution and connected modules.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of responsibilities to NGHE Solution with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Define fallback procedures for network failures.
Specify monitoring metrics for update latency and data consistency.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignment meets the acceptance criteria and architectural clarity requirements with manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Acquire and process telemetry data from vehicles and sensors within 1.0 s latency.
FR2: Update the centralized worksite model with processed data ensuring consistency and accuracy.
FR3: Distribute updated worksite model data to all relevant modules and stakeholders within latency constraints.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Network link latency and reliability are within acceptable bounds.
Telemetry data sources provide timely and accurate data.
open_risks: Potential network failures impacting update latency.
Processing bottlenecks in NGHE Solution under peak load.
evidence_needed: Latency performance data from system integration tests.
Network reliability statistics during operational scenarios.
